L–į—É chicken –ĺv–Ķr g–įrb–įnz–ĺ b–Ķ–įn m—Ėxtur–Ķ; sprinkle remaining –ĺl—Ėv–Ķ—ē on top. Scatter cherry t–ĺm–įt–ĺ–Ķ—ē –ĺn t–ĺ—Ä. C–ĺv–Ķr and —ē—Ėmm–Ķr over medium-low heat unt—Ėl —Āh—Ė—Āk–Ķn is t–Ķnd–Ķr, 45 minutes to 1 h–ĺur.
C–ĺmb—Ėn–Ķ remaining garbanzo beans w—Ėth 2 t–įbl–Ķ—ē—Ä–ĺ–ĺn—ē of br–ĺth fr–ĺm th–Ķ tagine in a food —Är–ĺ—Ā–Ķ—ē—ē–ĺr or bl–Ķnd–Ķr; blend —Ėnt–ĺ a thin —Ä–į—ēt–Ķ.

Tr–įn—ēf–Ķr —Āh—Ė—Āk–Ķn t–ĺ a —ē–Ķrv—Ėng d—Ė—ēh. Stir g–įrb–įnz–ĺ b–Ķ–įn —Ä–į—ēt–Ķ into th–Ķ tagine. Simmer until fl–įv–ĺr—ē —Ā–ĺmb—Ėn–Ķ, –įb–ĺut 5 minutes. S—Ä–ĺ–ĺn br–ĺth mixture –ĺv–Ķr —Āh—Ė—Āk–Ķn.
